subject: [PATCH v5 6/9] dax: plumb hotplug online_type through dax

2026-06-24.patch_summary: This patch allows drivers that use the dax_kmem driver to specify an auto-online policy when creating a DAX device. It adds a new field, 'online_type', to the DAX device creation path, which can be used to override the system default online policy. The system default is still used if no explicit policy is specified, and this change does not introduce any behavioral changes for existing callers.
